summary: Completed comprehensive testing of new interactive equipment configurator and verified existing catalog functionality. All 6-step wizard features working correctly with proper data persistence and UI interactions.

integration_issues.issue: Live estimate element occasionally not detected immediately after step 2 transition, though functionality works correctly
integration_issues.impact: Minor timing issue during automated testing, actual feature works properly

passed_tests: Backend /api/configurator endpoint (100% success rate - 18/18 tests)
All 6 configurator step transitions and validations
All 6 wash type cards with correct data-testids
All 5 post count options with correct data-testids
All 4 equipment type cards with correct data-testids
All 3 chemical delivery cards with correct data-testids
All 6 additional options checkboxes with correct data-testids
All 4 services checkboxes with correct data-testids
Contact form validation and submission (cfg-name, cfg-phone, cfg-email required)
Live cost estimation (7,775 Br → 15,575 Br → 9,775 Br based on selections)
Step indicator updates and navigation (Next/Back buttons)
Full configurator workflow from start to submission
Success message display and reset functionality
Existing catalog products loading and filtering
View mode switching (grid, compact, list)
Sorting functionality (price, name, new arrivals)
Pagination navigation
New Arrivals section (4 products displayed)
Partners section (7 brand logos displayed)
Contact form modal open/close
success_percentage: Backend: 100% (18/18), Frontend: 98% (49/50 - minor timing detection issue)
